name: Bark (Sound Effects)
description: Suno Bark with sound effect notation. Generates speech mixed with laughter, sighs, gasps, music, singing, and other non-verbal audio. Use bracket notation like [laughter] and ♪ for singing.
licenseNotes: Bark is released under MIT license by Suno.

metadata.searchDescription: Bark sound effects laughter singing music gasps sighs creative audio generation local mlx

samples.label: Laughter
samples.transcript: [clears throat] Well, that was unexpected! [laughter] Let me try that again.

samples.label: Singing
samples.transcript: ♪ Sunshine on my shoulders makes me happy ♪

samples.label: Sigh
samples.transcript: [sighs] I suppose we should get started on this project sooner rather than later.

modelCard.dataRetention: Local inference only — no data leaves device
knownLimitations: Non-deterministic output — results vary per generation
Sound effect quality varies — not all notations produce reliable results
No fine-grained control over SFX timing or intensity
modelCard.notes: Sound effect notation guide: [laughter], [laughs], [sighs], [music], [gasps], [clears throat] for inline effects. Use ♪ ... ♪ for singing. Combine speech and effects freely: "Hello! [laughter] That was funny." Non-deterministic — re-generate for different results. Supports 13+ languages for the speech portion.
